title: H&M India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: H&M India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
